targets.purpose: Render SPE TT integration status and link it to public TT implementation state.
Document the SPE Commitment Candidate boundary and TT-driven standing path.
Generate SDK manifests and receipts that include TT transition identifiers and SPE route expectations.

non_claims: This target list does not perform downstream installation.
This target list does not redefine TT semantics.
This target list does not grant commit-time permission.
